Type: make sure to change the offset in Kconfig.projbuild

# Name: # NVS partition for storing configuration (minimum 0x3000 for read/write NVS)
# esp_secure_cert partition - must be encrypted if using flash encryption
# OTA partitions - Two OTA app partitions (no factory to save space)
# Sized to accommodate binary (0xeb010 bytes) while fitting in 2MB flash
# App partitions must be aligned to 64KB (0x10000) boundaries
# OTA data partition to store OTA update information (must be 0x2000)
